summary_en: Update to capital-cost and share-price-conscious management framework disclosed 2024-12-19. Board reviewed and revised policy direction and implementation measures as of 2026-05-15. Specific targets and metrics not disclosed in header.
title_en: Response Regarding Realization of Capital-Cost and Share-Price-Conscious Management (Update)
translation_en_brief: On 2026-05-15, Ohishi Sangyo's board of directors reviewed and updated its capital-cost and share-price-conscious management framework, which was originally disclosed on 2024-12-19. The company reassessed its current status and revised its policy direction and implementation approach. Specific numeric targets, KPI definitions, and execution timelines are contained in the attached detailed document and are not disclosed in this cover announcement.
